category_sources: source_facts.description says high-performance configurable RADIUS server; official FreeRADIUS homepage says it is the open source implementation of RADIUS for AAA.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses FreeRADIUS; source_facts.name is freeradius-server, identifying the server package.
docs_sources: Official FreeRADIUS documentation page links getting-started docs, wiki, full server documentation, online manual pages, and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/FreeRADIUS/freeradius-server, so repo enrichment was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official FreeRADIUS homepage/documentation describe RADIUS, AAA, server configuration, modules, and policy server behavior.
